concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS072- Your authentication token request has been received; however, the external token is invalid. Please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS073- Your authentication token request has been received; however, the external token required is missing in the request. Please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS074- Your authentication token request has been received. Our attempt to connect with a third party application has failed. Please try again. If this issue persists, please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS075- Your authentication token request has been received. The external token has expired and has been rejected. Please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS076- Your authentication token request has been received. The validation of the practitioner's license number included in the external token has failed. The license number provided did not match what we have associated to your profile. Please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Secure Token Service. At this time the STS errors do not leverage the OperationOutcome; as a result ISS codes are only embedded in the display text.
concept.enDisplayName: ISS077- Your authentication token request has been received. The validation of the practitioner's license issuer (OID) included in the external token has failed. The provided license issuer did not match what we have associated to your profile. Please contact your Technical Support team.

concept.name: Duplicate checking based on Message Header ID.
concept.enDisplayName: This Message Header Id and message content have already been submitted. This is a duplicate submission.

concept.name: Duplicate checking with different message content
concept.enDisplayName: This is a duplicate message submission with content that differs from the original

concept.name: Trace Id required
concept.enDisplayName: The variable 'X-TELUS-SDF-TraceId' is needed in the request header and must not be empty

concept.name: Only UTF-8 characters are to be supported
concept.enDisplayName: The message should be encoded with characters supported by the UTF-8 encoding only and a non-UTF-8 encoded character was detected in the message. Message rejected.

concept.name: FHIR validation issue
concept.enDisplayName: FHIR Message validation failed. Message is not properly formatted.

concept.name: Sender validation failure
concept.enDisplayName: This Sender Clinic/Organization/Location is not recognized in the Provider Registry

concept.name: Destination validation failure
concept.enDisplayName: This Destination Clinic/Organization/Location is not recognized in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Sender does not have contract
concept.enDisplayName: Sender does not have a contract in the Provider Registry to allow this type of message.

concept.name: Destination does not have contract
concept.enDisplayName: Destination does not have a contract in the Provider Registry to allow this type of message

concept.name: Sending application version issue
concept.enDisplayName: Sending application version in the inbound message does not match the value in the PrescribeIT database.

concept.name: Sender Organizaton not active
concept.enDisplayName: Sender Organization status is not active for message types : 301, 302, 305, 401, 901, 997, 998, and 999.

concept.name: Destination Organization is not active
concept.enDisplayName: Destination Organization status is not active for message types : 301, 302, 305, 401, 901, 997, 998, and 999.

concept.name: 201 Prescriber validation
concept.enDisplayName: Prescriber does not have a relationship to the Destination Organization

concept.name: SAML token validation issue
concept.enDisplayName: PrescribeIT™ reject due to synchronous validation failure SAML Token Validation failure ISS141 – SAML Token is not valid.Message is rejected. No re-submission

concept.name: Invalid SAML token
concept.enDisplayName: PrescribeIT™ reject due to : Invalid SAML claim. No re-submission

concept.name: Cancel Prescription must be standalone message
concept.enDisplayName: PrescribeIT™ Cancel Requests (e140 task) must be delivered as a standalone message; they cannot be bundled with other messages except in the case where all medication (or non-medication) orders within a prescription are cancelled at the same time. The e140 task must be bundled separately and can not be bundled with any other message type. No re-submission

concept.name: Incorrect 401 bundle.
concept.enDisplayName: Incorrect 401 bundle. The following tags must not be in the input bundle : message-key, last-name, birth-date.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription not found
concept.enDisplayName: Prescription bundle rejected due to prescription not found and/or missing mandatory headers. For the Deferred or Held prescriptions, mandatory headers: X-SHAREDHEALTH-EXCHANGE-SENDING-ORGANIZATION-ID and X-SHAREDHEALTH-EXCHANGE-SENDING-APP-INSTANCE-ID.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription already downloaded
concept.enDisplayName: This prescription has already been downloaded by another Pharmacy and is therefore not available.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription reserved by another pharmacy
concept.enDisplayName: 401 bundle rejected due to: Prescription found, but already reserved by another pharmacy.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription found but not downloaded
concept.enDisplayName: Delete - 401 bundle rejected due to: Prescription found, but has not been downloaded yet.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription already deleted
concept.enDisplayName: 401 bundle rejected due to: Prescription found, but already deleted (ACKNOWLEDGED).

concept.name: Message Header for sending organization not defined
concept.enDisplayName: 401 bundle rejected due to: Header X-SHAREDHEALTH-EXCHANGE-SENDING-ORGANIZATION-ID is not defined or is invalid.

concept.name: Message Header for sending application not defined
concept.enDisplayName: 401 bundle rejected due to : Header X-SHAREDHEALTH-EXCHANGE-SENDER-APPLICATION-ID is not defined. No re-submission

concept.name: Invalid Deferred or Held GET request
concept.enDisplayName: The request to download a prescription requires two pieces of data: (Identifier + Last name) or (Identifier + Date of Birth).

concept.name: New RX - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: New RX Failed. New Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique No re-submission.

concept.name: Original Dispense - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Original Dispense. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Dispense Refill Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Dispense Refill. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Cancel Pending - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel Pending. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Cancel Accept - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel Accept. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Cancel Decline - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel Decline. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Cancel Revoke - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel Revoke. Prescription Id (medicationOrder.Identifier) is not Unique. No re-submission.

concept.name: Dispense Notification - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: The dispense notification cannot be processed because there is cancel request in pending state

concept.name: Cancel Already submitted
concept.enDisplayName: This is the second submission of a cancel request

concept.name: communication. Attachments exceeded allowed size of 50MB
concept.enDisplayName: 301 bundle rejected due to : Attachment size exceeds 50 MB.

concept.name: e180 reject as cancel not allowed
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel task e-180m rejected due to : Cancel request can not be generated for Deferred prescription No re-submission

concept.name: 305 communication. Missing ext-communication-enterer
concept.enDisplayName: 305 Message from Organization to Practitioner ext-communication-enterer is mandatory

concept.name: Provider Registry failure due to missing parameter
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search failed as the result of unavailable mandatory parameter. Required parameters must have a valid value specified

concept.name: TPR cache. The GET by identifier 0 results
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search (GET) by Identifier didn’t result in any match. Resource is not found. May be a typo in the identifier provided.

concept.name: Provider Registry query not structured properly
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search failed as the result of unavailable Practitioner:organization parameter in _include or _revinclude. Required parameters must have value specified. Query is not structured correctly.

concept.name: Provider Registry = elastic search not structured properly
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search failed as the result of elastic-search-attribute-set value is not equal to 001 and 002. Query is not structured correctly

concept.name: Provider Registry - minimum length issue
concept.enDisplayName: The [PARAMETER NAME] Value that was sent had less then mandatory length: 3 characters. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - telephone number issue
concept.enDisplayName: The telephone number must be structured as a 10 digit number. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - incorrectly formatted request
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search failed as the result of incorrectly formatted Request. Multiple values detected for non-repeatable parameter [Parameter Name]. This server is not configured to allow multiple (AND/OR) values for this param. No re-submission

concept.name: Provider Registry - address line failure
concept.enDisplayName: TPRCache search failed as the result of incorrectly formatted Request. Cannot use address-line:exact and address-line:contains in same Search Query. No re-submission

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: Bundle rejected due to: MedicationOrder identifier element is incorrect.

concept.name: Provider Registry search parameter- minimum length issue
concept.enDisplayName: The [PARAMETER NAME] Value that was sent had less then mandatory length: 2 characters. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Formulary - invalid search parameters used
concept.enDisplayName: The search parameters you have included in your search are not valid.

concept.name: Provider Registry - wild cards not supported
concept.enDisplayName: "TPRCache search failed as the result of: Wild cards not allowed to use in search parameters."

concept.name: Provider Registry -
concept.enDisplayName: "TPRCache search failed as the result of: The FHIR endpoint on this server does not know how to handle GET operation Organization with missing parameter [role]" Query is not structured correctly. (elastic search)

concept.name: Invalid Sender Profile Direction
concept.enDisplayName: Invalid Sender Profile Direction

concept.name: Destination cannot receive message
concept.enDisplayName: The destination cannot receive message . No re-submission

concept.name: Destination cannot receive task
concept.enDisplayName: The destination cannot receive task . No re-submission

concept.name: Sender is not conformed to send task
concept.enDisplayName: Sender cannot send this task. Not conformed.

concept.name: Formulary - application headers missing
concept.enDisplayName: One or more mandatory application header(s) is/are missing or empty.

concept.name: Formulary - request invalid
concept.enDisplayName: When a formulary query request is found to be invalid then PrescribeIT™ must send a coded error response back to the EMR. These scenarios must include: The Application Id given with header X-TELUS-SDF-APPID not found in the provider registry.

concept.name: Formulary - application ID not recognized
concept.enDisplayName: Provided application id is not recognized in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Formulary - application instance not recognized
concept.enDisplayName: Provided application instance id is not recognized in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Formulary - Organization ID not recognized
concept.enDisplayName: Provided organization id is not recognized in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Formulary - practitioner ID not recognized
concept.enDisplayName: Provided practitioner id is not recognized in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Formulary - application instance ID issue
concept.enDisplayName: Provided application instance id is not tied to the provided application id in the Provider Registry.

concept.name: Formulary - application id doesn't match org
concept.enDisplayName: Provided application id is not allowed to send request on behalf of provided organization id according to the Provider registry

concept.name: Formulary - organization ID not enrolled
concept.enDisplayName: Provided organization id has not the expected PrescibeIT enrolment to perform this request, or the organization is not active.

concept.name: 305 communication. Organization to Practitioner error.
concept.enDisplayName: MessageHeader/source/endpoint does not match Communication/reply-to/valueReference/reference value, Or Communication/reply-to/valueReference/reference value does not match Communication/sender

concept.name: 305 communication. Organization to Practitioner error.
concept.enDisplayName: MessageHeader/destination/endpoint does not match Communication/recipient/OBO/valueReference/reference value

concept.name: 305 communication. Organization/OBO doesn't exist
concept.enDisplayName: Recipient Organization/OBO does not exist in registry

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: Communication/Sender does not match Communication/replay-to/valueReference/reference value.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: Sender is LOCUM: MessageHeader/source/endpoint does not match Communication/reply-to/OBO/valueReference/reference value.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: Communication/reply-to/ext-reference-on-behalf-of does not exist

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: MessageHeader/destination/endpoint does not match Communication/recipient/OBO/valueReference/reference value.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: 301/305 message sent with an attachment payload where UUID of the attachment has already been used.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: 305 Message from Practitioner to Organization: Sender practitioner Id is inactive.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: 305 Message from Organization to Practitioner: Recipient practitioner Id is inactive.

concept.name: TPR cache registry query
concept.enDisplayName: TPR cache search failed as the result of invalid characters(s) in the elastic search string

concept.name: The bundle can only contain Pharmacist Adapt tasks
concept.enDisplayName: When submitting a Pharmacist Adapt (p170-m) the bundle must only contain Pharmacist Adapt tasks. We have identified tasks of different types contained in this bundle. If you are able, correct and resubmit. Else, please provide the Detail Code and Reference Number shown below. Detail Code {0} - Reference # {1}.

concept.name: The bundle can only contain Pharmacist Prescribe tasks
concept.enDisplayName: When submitting a Pharmacist Prescribe task (p190-,) the bundle must only contain Pharmacist Prescribe tasks. We have identified task of different types contained in this bundle. If you are able, correct and resubmit. Else, please contact technical support and provide the Detail Code and Reference Number shown below. Detail Code {0} - Reference # {1}.

concept.name: Attachment upload service - antivirus failure
concept.enDisplayName: Antivirus check failed.

concept.name: Attachment download service
concept.enDisplayName: Attachment not available.

concept.name: Attachment upload/download service
concept.enDisplayName: Attachment validation failed.

concept.name: For Capability Check - Do not deliver, we will accept the message, but not route to the destination, as they are unable to manage it. Instead we append an OO to our HTTP2x response.
concept.enDisplayName: The message was accepted but not routed to the destination due to the capabilities of the destination system.

concept.name: To support the implementation of the Capability Check – Accept do not deliver feature we have assessed the content of the bundle and found that at least one of the tasks should not be delivered to the destination.
concept.enDisplayName: This message cannot be delivered to the desired destination. Our profiles indicate that at least one of the messages in this bundle cannot be managed by the destination. Please revert to manual processing for this message and call Technical support and provide them with the Detail Code and Reference Number shown below. \n\nDetail Code {0} - Reference # {1}.

concept.name: Provider Registry - Error when fax number is not 10 digits for the discrete search.
concept.enDisplayName: The fax number must be structured as a 10 digit number. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - Error when the organization name occurs twice in the query
concept.enDisplayName: Only a single name is allowed. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - Error when the family name occurs twice in the query
concept.enDisplayName: Only a single family name is allowed. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - Error when address city occurs twice in the query
concept.enDisplayName: Only a single organization.address-city is allowed. Please update and try again.

concept.name: Provider Registry - Error when the _lastUpdated parameter is not valid.
concept.enDisplayName: The _lastUpdated parameter provided in the request is not valid. Please correct this and resubmit the request.

concept.name: Inbox polling acknowledge
concept.enDisplayName: We have determined that you sent an acknowledgement response; however, you have sent it to an incorrect URL address. Please correct this and resend it. Note: Messages that have not been properly acknowledged will remain in your inbox.

concept.name: Deferred or Held Prescription archived
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle is found, but has been archived and therefore is no longer available for download.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: For message delivery validation there must be at least one of quantity or expectedSupplyDuration that must be supplied.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: For message delivery validation there must be at least one of total prescribed quantity or total days supply that must be supplied.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: For message delivery validation the For Life flag cannot be set to true.

concept.name: Registry query - message header validation
concept.enDisplayName: In the message header, you must provide the CPRId representing the organization sending of this request. The CPR Id is either not found or a CPR Id has not been provided.

concept.name: Registry query - message header validation
concept.enDisplayName: The CPRId presented in the registration query is associated to a jurisdiction that prevents the solution from returning the record. Therefore, no results are available.

concept.name: Inbox polling acknowledge
concept.enDisplayName: During inspection of this request (clear-message-queue) we determined that a bundle id has been presented multiple times with conflicting methods (both PUT and DELETE). We cannot process this entire request.

concept.name: Inbox polling acknowledge
concept.enDisplayName: This request contains a method that is not supported. For the 'clear-message-queue' request, we only support PUT and DELETE.

concept.name: Inbox polling acknowledge
concept.enDisplayName: For the 'clear-message- queue' when the method of PUT is provided, a 'cancel reason' must be provided.

concept.name: Cancel the download of a deferred or held prescription
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle does not have the status of 'acknowledged', therefore it is not eligible to be 'cancel/reversed'

concept.name: Cancel the download of a deferred or held prescription
concept.enDisplayName: Our records indicate that one or more of the Rx/Medication Orders within this prescription bundle are not in a state where the cancel can proceed, i.e. one or more have a 'dispense' actioned against it.

concept.name: Cancel the download of a deferred or held prescription
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle download cannot be cancelled as the PMS that has requested to cancel the download does not match the PMS that acknowledged the original download.

concept.name: Held Prescription cannot be downloaded
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle download cannot proceed as the PMS that has requested the download does not match the pharmacy destination CPRID that is identified in the original 401 bundle.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: The message that has been submitted cannot be routed. Based on the jurisdictional rules the sender's jurisdiction cannot send this message type. Message type not supported: 101.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: The message that has been submitted cannot be routed. Based on the jurisdictional rules the destination's jurisdiction cannot receive this message type. Message type not supported: 101.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: The message that has been submitted cannot be routed. Based on the jurisdictional rules the sender's jurisdiction cannot send this message type. Message types not supported: 201, 305, 401.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: The message that has been submitted cannot be routed. Based on the jurisdictional rules the destination's jurisdiction cannot receive this message type. Message types not supported: 201, 305, 401.

concept.name: Deferred Prescription cannot be downloaded
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle download cannot proceed as the PMS that has requested the download does not have the jurisdictional privileges to retrieve this message.

concept.name: Message delivery validation
concept.enDisplayName: The message that has been submitted cannot be routed. Deferred Rx prescriptions cannot be sent with other prescription types.

concept.name: Held Prescription cannot be downloaded
concept.enDisplayName: The prescription bundle download cannot proceed as it is no longer available for retrieval.

concept.name: New RX - Medication Order is not unique
concept.enDisplayName: The Identifier is not unique. RX ID was already used and original order has been discontinued.

concept.name: Discontinue order already submitted
concept.enDisplayName: This is the second submission of a discontinue request.

concept.name: 901 asynchronous notification
concept.enDisplayName: Message is routed via fax route.

concept.name: 999 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Message was not delivered to the destination.

concept.name: 999 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Message was not delivered to the destination via fax.

concept.name: 999 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Message failed to be delivered to the destination.

concept.name: 997/999 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Destination didn't pick the message from their inbox.

concept.name: 997/999 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Destination polled, but didn't acknowledge the message from their inbox.

concept.name: 998 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: An attachment was not uploaded.

concept.name: 998 asynchronous error
concept.enDisplayName: Unable to route message to destination due to an internal error.

concept.name: Practitioner is not associated to the organization.
concept.enDisplayName: The practitioner and organization do not have an association in the provider registry.
concept.frDisplayName: Le praticien et l'organisation ne sont pas associés dans le registre des fournisseurs.

concept.name: Practitioner contract status is not valid.
concept.enDisplayName: The practitioner must have a valid status, and the status must be Active or Pending.\n Follow up with your administrator or support team if needed.
concept.frDisplayName: Le praticien doit avoir un statut valide, c'est-à-dire Actif ou En attente./nCommuniquez avec votre administrateur ou équipe de soutien, au besoin.

concept.name: The practitioner could not be found in the provider registry.
concept.enDisplayName: The practitioner could not be found in the provider registry.\n Follow up with your administrator or support team if needed.
concept.frDisplayName: Impossible de trouver le praticien dans le registre des fournisseurs./nCommuniquez avec votre administrateur ou équipe de soutien, au besoin.

concept.name: Organization contract status is not valid.
concept.enDisplayName: The organization must have a valid contract and its status must be Active or Pending.\n Follow up with your administrator or support team if needed.
concept.frDisplayName: L'organisation doit détenir un contrat valide et son statut doit être Actif ou En attente./nCommuniquez avec votre administrateur ou équipe de soutien, au besoin.

concept.name: Invalid date or time in the request.
concept.enDisplayName: The date timestamp in the request is invalid.
concept.frDisplayName: L'horodatage de la demande n'est pas valide.

concept.name: Organization status is not Active.
concept.enDisplayName: The organization status must be Active.\n Follow up with your administrator or support team if needed.
concept.frDisplayName: Le statut de l'organisation doit être actif./nCommuniquez avec votre administrateur ou équipe de soutien, au besoin.

concept.name: One or more medications do not contain an Indication For Use.
concept.enDisplayName: The ‘Indication for Use’ value has not been provided for the following medications, which is mandatory based on regulations in your province: {1}, {2}... \n Please add the ‘Indication for Use’ value to these medications and resubmit them.
concept.frDisplayName: L'indication d'utilisation n'a pas été fournie pour les médicaments suivants; il s'agit d'une valeur obligatoire établie en fonction de la réglementation dans votre province : {1}, {2}... \n Veuillez ajouter la valeur de l'indication d'utilisation à ces médicaments et les soumettre à nouveau.

concept.name: Issue Performing Capability Search
concept.enDisplayName: An unexpected error has occurred when searching for the destination’s list of supported messages (capabilities). Please call Technical support and provide them with the Detail Code and Reference Number shown below. \n Detail Code {0} – Reference # {1}.
concept.frDisplayName: Une erreur inattendue est survenue lors de la recherche de la liste de messages pris en charge par le destinataire. Veuillez communiquer avec le soutien technique et fournissez-leur le code de détail et le numéro de référence affichés ci-dessous :\n{1}

concept.name: Accepted But Not Delivered, Prescriber Contract Invalid
concept.enDisplayName: Message was accepted but not delivered to the destination due to the prescriber not having a contract with PrescribeIT
concept.frDisplayName: Le message a été accepté, mais n'a pas été livré au destinataire, car le prescripteur n’est pas enregistré à PrescripTIon

concept.name: Accepted But Not Delivered, Clinic Contract Invalid
concept.enDisplayName: Message was accepted but not delivered to the destination due to the clinic not having a contract with PrescribeIT
concept.frDisplayName: Le message a été accepté, mais n'a pas été livré au destinataire, car la clinique n’est pas enregistré à PrescripTIon

concept.name: Accepted But Not Delivered, Prescriber not Associated to Clinic
concept.enDisplayName: Message was accepted but not delivered to the destination due to the prescriber not being associated to the specified clinic
concept.frDisplayName: Le message a été accepté, mais n'a pas été livré au destinataire, car le prescripteur n'est pas associé à la clinique spécifiée

concept.name: Accepted But Not Delivered, Inactive Prescriber
concept.enDisplayName: Message was accepted but not delivered to the destination due to the prescriber being inactive on PrescribeIT
concept.frDisplayName: Le message a été accepté, mais n'a pas été livré au destinataire, car le prescripteur n’est pas activé sur PrescripTIon

concept.name: Accepted But Not Delivered, Inactive Clinic
concept.enDisplayName: Message was accepted but not delivered to the destination due to the clinic being inactive on PrescribeIT
concept.frDisplayName: Le message a été accepté, mais n'a pas été livré au destinataire, car la clinique n’est pas activé sur PrescripTIon

concept.name: State tracking lock ack error: Prescription already sent .
concept.enDisplayName: The same message has already been sent with both the same content and the same header X-TELUS-SDF-TraceId

concept.name: Destination Organization is not recognized
concept.enDisplayName: The destination organization is not recognized

concept.name: Unrecognized Message Type
concept.enDisplayName: Initial Validation failed as the result of unrecognized Message Type

concept.name: Medication Order must belong to same original bundle
concept.enDisplayName: Cancel requests sent in a single bundle must be part of the same original Prescription

concept.name: Invalid GET request due to bad query parameters
concept.enDisplayName: 401 bundle rejected due to : Bad query parameters. No re-submission

concept.name: communication. OBO and Desinations count does not match
concept.enDisplayName: The number of Communication OBO organizations should be same as Message header destination number. 301 Destination endpoint in the message header does not match communication recipient ext-reference-on-behalf-of organization.

concept.name: communication. Validation Organization to Practitioner
concept.enDisplayName: 301 The practitioner does not belong to the ext-reference-on-behalf-of organization

concept.name: communication. Sender validation has failed.
concept.enDisplayName: 301 Sender endpoint in message header does not match ext-reference-on-behalf-of organization from Communicate-reply-to

concept.name: communication. Mandatory parameter missing
concept.enDisplayName: 301 ext-reference-on-behalf-of is missing under communication-reply-to

concept.name: communication. Sender details doe not match expected input
concept.enDisplayName: 301 communication sender does not match ext-communication-reply-to practitioner

concept.name: Aged process.
concept.enDisplayName: The messages were not picked up by the recipient.

concept.name: No sender Capability
concept.enDisplayName: No Sender Capability available for a particular Sender

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: Communication/recipient/ext-reference-on-behalf-of does not exist

concept.name: communication. Unable to resolve destinations.
concept.enDisplayName: 301 Processor Unable to resolve any of the destinations in the message.

concept.name: communciation. Failed to route message to recipient inbox.
concept.enDisplayName: 301 Processor Failed to route message to recipient inbox. Error Details

concept.name: communication. Unable to insert destination in Inbox
concept.enDisplayName: 301 Processor Unable to insert destinations details an InboxEntryEntity must be obtained first

concept.name: Secure Delivery Framework
concept.enDisplayName: Secure Delivery Framework error has occurred.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: MessageHeader/source/endpoint does not match Communication/reply-to/OBO/valueReference/reference value.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: Sender with wrong type.

concept.name: 305 communication. Attachment error.
concept.enDisplayName: The attachment content-type is not in: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/tiff, text/plai

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: MessageHeader/destination/endpoint does not match Communication/recipient/OBO/valueReference/reference value.

concept.name: 305 communication. Validation error.
concept.enDisplayName: The a Clinician Communication is directed to an organization but the destination organization does not support Clinician Communication

concept.name: Issue detected by validator
concept.enDisplayName: FHIR Message Validation failed. Message is not properly formated.

concept.name: Formulary - TM cannot be found
concept.enDisplayName: If the Product ID is a DIN with the Representative DIN boolean set to TRUE and a TM cannot be found in the formulary table for that Jurisdiction

concept.name: Formulary - Product ID not found
concept.enDisplayName: If the Representative DIN boolean is set to false and the product ID cannot be found in appropriate MP, NTP or TM columns for that Jurisdiction

concept.name: Formulary - DIN assigned to multiple products
concept.enDisplayName: Formulary query request finds multiple valid Product ID codes. This may occur when Canada assigns the same DIN to multiple products.

concept.name: Formulary Code and Coverage cannot be found.
concept.enDisplayName: Formulary Code and Coverage cannot be found.
